title: Crossing the Border
content: Marcus was excited to visit a neighboring country during his trip. At the border crossing, he showed his passport and answered a few simple questions from an officer. The process was quick and organized. Soon afterward, he was traveling through a new country with different signs, language, and culture. Although the differences were small, everything felt fresh and interesting. Marcus enjoyed observing local customs and comparing them with those of his own country. Crossing the border made the journey feel even more adventurous.
